title: Yosys lacks a warning for a port being driven by 0.
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.39+165

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Hello, we performed synthesis on an rtl.v file and noticed that Yosys’s warning messages lacked information about “port y” being driven by 0. For a detailed description, please refer to the question file in the attachment. We kindly ask you to address and resolve this issue promptly.
[Relevant_documents.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/17536637/Relevant_documents.zip)




### Expected Behavior

Yosys should generate a rich number and variety of warning messages without missing any types of warnings. In the attached test case, for the synthesis of "port y", the following 6 warning messages should be present.
1、design top has port y[458] driven by constant 0
2、design top has port y[457] driven by constant 0
3、design top has port y[456] driven by constant 0
4、design top has port y[455] driven by constant 0
5、design top has port y[454] driven by constant 0
6、design top has port y[453] driven by constant 0

### Actual Behavior

The Yoysy warning messages did not include the above-expected 6 warning messages, and the types of warning messages were singular.
